text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Such a nice tune... Thank you for the present,
Miracle.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Music is like a wind that stirs my heart. It feels
good in a way that's different from running.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome... But you really like it? All I did
was play the piano as my present.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
I'm not good enough to call that a gift... Maybe I
should go out and get you a real present.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
No, your rhythmic tones are always like an
easterly wind that gently brushes through
budding flowers...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've had your wind blow over me, I feel
like I can bloom into my full glory.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Easterly wind... Um, the wind in spring? That must
be a compliment. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Speaking in terms like that, I like your tones as
well, Zephyr.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
The way you play the trumpet so clearly is
refreshing. How do I say it... Yes, it's like a breeze
in the morning.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
A morning breeze... Really? I'm so happy to be
spoken of that way.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Miracle, in that case, would you let me celebrate
your birthday with my morning breeze?
